message:
fix: Update demo default query to simple vector search

- Remove reference to non-existent translations.lance
- Default query now shows vector search: WHERE embedding NEAR 'sunset beach'
- Replace "Translations" button with "High Aesthetic" filter example
- Keep encoder/topK defaults fix from previous commit

files.patch:
@@ -2034,11 +2034,10 @@
@@ -2059,7 +2058,7 @@ data-sql="SELECT * FROM read_lance('https://data.metal0.dev/laion-1m/images.lance') LIMIT 50">First 50 + data-sql="SELECT url, text, aesthetic FROM read_lance('https://data.metal0.dev/laion-1m/images.lance') WHERE aesthetic > 6.0 ORDER BY aesthetic DESC LIMIT 20">High Aesthetic @@ -2820,11 +2819,10 @@

// Default demo dataset URL - LAION 1M images dataset const DEFAULT_DATASET_URL = 'https://data.metal0.dev/laion-1m/images.lance'; - const DEFAULT_QUERY = `-- 🚀 Push-Down Filtering + JOIN (downloads ~200KB, not 1.5GB!) -SELECT i.url, i.text, t.text_zh, t.text_es -FROM read_lance('https://data.metal0.dev/laion-1m/images.lance') i -JOIN read_lance('https://data.metal0.dev/laion-1m/translations.lance') t ON i.rowid = t.row_id -WHERE i.embedding NEAR 'sunset' + const DEFAULT_QUERY = `-- 🔍 Vector Search: Find images similar to "sunset beach" +SELECT url, text, aesthetic +FROM read_lance('https://data.metal0.dev/laion-1m/images.lance') +WHERE embedding NEAR 'sunset beach' LIMIT 20`; // Initialize
